questions.answer: Photosynthesis is when plants make food from sunlight. The plant uses light and water to make glucose which gives it energy to grow.

questions.text: Describe the structure of a mitochondrion.
questions.answer: A mitochondrion has two membranes - an outer one and an inner one. It has a space inside called the matrix. The inner membrane has folds for energy production.

questions.text: What is the function of DNA?
questions.answer: DNA carries genes that tell cells what to do. It passes information from parents to children and controls how our bodies work.

questions.text: Explain the process of protein synthesis.
questions.answer: First, DNA makes mRNA which goes to the ribosome. Then tRNA brings amino acids and they connect together to make proteins. This happens in the ribosome.

questions.text: What are the main types of tissues in animals?
questions.answer: There are muscles, skin, organs, and nerves. Each type has different jobs in the body.
